chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Muhammad Al-juʿfi

text: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن محمّد الجعفيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن عبد اللّه بن محمّد الجعفيّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Juʿfi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Jafar ibn Bashir, from Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Juʿfi.
